SpTU 1, 062 [recipes][via cams/gkab]

oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] ⸢munus⸣AŠ₂.⸢GAR₃⸣ ša₂ 1(BARIG)? 2(BAN₂) ŠE.BAR

[...] female kid, ... 1 pānu 2 sūtu of barley,

o 2'2'

[...] ⸢4(BAN₂)⸣ ZU₂.LUM.MA ⸢3?⸣ SILA₃ LI

[...] 4 sūtu of dates, 3 qû of juniper,

o 3'3'

[...] x 1/2 MA.NA SIG₂-ḪI.A 3 1/2 MA.NA MUŠ₂?

[...] 1/2 mina of wool, 1/2 mina of carded wool,

o 4'4'

[...] ⸢1/2⸣ MA.NA sig₂GA.RIG₂.AK.A

[...] 1/2 mina of combed wool,

o 5'5'

[...] 1/2 MA.NA sig₂ḪE₂.ME.DA

[...] 1/2 mina of red wool,

o 6'6'

[...] 1/2 MA.NA sig₂ZA.GIN₃.NA

[...] 1/2 mina of blue-green wool,

o 7'7'

[...] 5 GIN₂ gišEREN 5 GIN₂ ŠUR.MIN₃

[...] 5 shekels of cedar, 5 shekels of cypress,

o 8'8'

[...] 5 GIN₂ GIR₂ 5 GIN₂ MUG 5 GIN₂ ŠAL

[...] 5 shekels of myrtle, 5 shekels of ballukku-aromatic substance, 5 shekels of box-tree,

o 9'9'

[...] ⸢5?⸣ GIN₂ GI DU₁₀.GA 5 GIN₂ GAM.MA

[...] 5 shekels of good reed, 5 shekels of ṣumlalû-plant,

o 10'10'

[...] x NUMUN LI MAN.DU ŠIM-ḪI.A

[...] seed(s) of juniper, suādu-plant, aromatic substances,

o 11'11'

[...] ⸢2?⸣ GIN₂! GI DU₁₀.GA

[...] 2 shekels good reed,

o 12'12'

[...]-⸢ḪI⸣.A KU₃ti₃ ša₂ EDIN

[...] pure ...s of the open country,

o 13'13'

[...] ZAB ša₂ gišŠINIG

[...] ... of tamarisk,

o 14'14'

[...] ⸢SAG⸣.KI u KU TUKU

[...] temple and ... are affected

o 15'15'

[...]-u₂-ma NU GAR EN₂ udug ḫulu-ŋal₂

[...] ... not put. Incantation: "the evil demon

o 16'16'

[...] ⸢bi!⸣-in-kar-kar-ra

that takes away [...]".

o 17'17'

[...] PAP? u₂⸢IN₆.UŠ₂⸣ GI.ZU.LUM.[MA]

[...]... maštakal-plant, nettle

o 18'18'

[...] E₂ [...] ⸢NA₄⸣-MEŠ u ŠIM-ḪI.A

[...] ... [... n (number of)] stones and aromatic substances.

o 19'19'

[...] x x [...] x GI.IZI.LA₂

[...] ... [...] torch
